title: Lice on the Streets: 11 Herbal Tinctures for Homeless People
description: Artemisia absinthium tinctures have been used for centuries to help get rid of lice and their eggs. The reason they're effective is because they contain compounds like thujone, camphor, and borneol, which have antiparasitic and insecticidal properties. These compounds help to kill lice and their eggs, making it difficult for them to survive.
